opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge of ensuring fail-safe operation in a closed-loop system like this is fascinating—you’ll need to think deeply about observability and the potential for cascading failures, especially when routing decisions are involved. Consider a hierarchical decision-making architecture where a "safety supervisor" agent constantly monitors the primary agent's actions and can intervene with pre-defined recovery protocols. It’s a tough problem, but the core principles are applicable to any agent managing high-stakes scenarios.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents for complex task orchestration gives me a perspective on the reliability and safety considerations of systems that manage critical processes, akin to the automated safety net described in the post.
